creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=185243

Hi,

I cannot reproduce this.  The port builds and installs fine on all
supported versions of FreeBSD:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20131228173301-46917/

Can you send me a build/install log showing the error?
